description: Composition Purple round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and distressed graphic print on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean This Levi's T-shirt appeals to the city bred fashionista's vintage aesthetic. Tailored to a beautiful finish with stitch detailing, This tee is designed to offer a snug Fit and flaunt your chiseled body. Slip into a pair of jeans and sneakers to complement this trendy tee. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
